Package pjv.model

Class Client

java.lang.Object
pjv.model.Client
@Entity
public class Client
extends java.lang.Object
Client entity class. This class is mapped by the Hibernate. It contains all required information about the client.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk and Michal Pechník

    • equals

      public boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
      This method overrides equals() method of Object class to indicate whether some other object is "equal to" this one. Returns true if the arguments are deeply equal to each other and false otherwise.
      Overrides:
      equals in class java.lang.Object
      Parameters:
      o - Object
      Returns:
      boolean value
